name: handoff-mcp
description: MCP Server for shared project context across multiple LLMs (Claude, Gemini, Copilot)

scripts.build: bun build src/index.ts --outfile dist/index.js --target bun && echo '#!/usr/bin/env bun' | cat - dist/index.js > dist/tmp.js && mv dist/tmp.js dist/index.js && chmod +x dist/index.js
